name: Electrify America Partner API
description: REST APIs enabling automotive OEMs and enterprise integrators to locate charging stations, check real-time charger availability, retrieve session pricing, and manage charging sessions. Authentication via OAuth2 / Auth0.

offers.description: Partner access requires OAuth2 credentials issued through the Electrify America developer portal.

serviceOutput.name: Charging Station Locations
serviceOutput.description: Geographic data for Electrify America charging stations including address, connectors, and amenities

serviceOutput.name: Real-Time Charger Availability
serviceOutput.description: Live connector status including available, in-use, faulted, and offline states

serviceOutput.name: Charging Session Data
serviceOutput.description: Session telemetry including energy delivered, duration, and cost

serviceOutput.name: Pricing Data
serviceOutput.description: Per-kWh and time-of-use pricing for charging stations
